summary: A clip from a Fox News segment. A photo of a young man in a dark sweatshirt standing by a car is shown, with the lower-third JUDGE ORDERS RELEASE OF MIGRANT WANTED FOR MURDER. The segment cuts to a portrait of a judge in robes against a bookshelf backdrop, marked UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE DISTRICT OF RHODE ISLAND.

script.scene: A photo of a young man by a car; lower-third reads JUDGE ORDERS RELEASE OF MIGRANT WANTED FOR MURDER.
A portrait of a judge in robes is shown, marked UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE DISTRICT OF RHODE ISLAND.
Continued footage with the FOX NEWS ALERT banner.
